LOBBY QUEUE

Random teammates, your skill level, your game. Convert any match into a lasting lobby with one click.

Camera is disabled in Queue. Screen share is allowed. For camera, move the group to a private call or lobby.

Tips
⭐ Star a channel in the sidebar to pin it to the top.
🔔 The What's New pill shows a red dot when there's a new release.
🎮 Browse tournaments across all lobbies via the Tournaments button up top.
↵ Click the LOBBY wordmark any time to jump home.
